name: Sourdough Apple Sorcery
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flours, wheat germ, salt, baking soda, baking powder, and cinnamon in a bowl and blend well.
2. In a large bowl, beat egg lightly and blend in sugar and oil. Mix in sourdough starter and applesauce and mix well.
3. Add the flour mixture and stir just until dry ingredients are moistened. Spoon batter into 4 prepared loaf pans.
4. Bake in an oven preheated to 350°F for 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the bread comes out clean.
5. Cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes, then turn each pan right side up and remove from waxed paper.
